logo.sourceName: TVS Motor official website header logo

verification.method: Lifted cell-by-cell from the user-supplied TVS_Motor_Financials_Actuals_FY16_FY25.xlsx workbook, which was compiled from the standalone audited annual reports + Q4 result packages for each FY. Derived items (EBITDA, EBIT, FCF, margins, ratios) computed by formula from disclosed line items.
verification.upgradePath: Already at the highest verification tier in this dashboard.

sources.primary: TVS Motor Company Annual Reports FY16–FY25 (standalone audited) + audited Q4 result packages
sources.notes: Derived items (EBITDA, EBIT, FCF, ratios, margins) computed from disclosed line items. No estimates used. Consolidated TVS Credit / financial-services figures excluded.

perFY.FY17: TVS 2017 AR · Standalone financial statements · pp. 78–82
perFY.FY19: TVS 2019 AR · Standalone financial statements · pp. 92–96
perFY.FY20: TVS 2021 AR · Standalone comparatives · pp. 104–108 + Q4 FY20 audited statement cross-check
perFY.FY21: TVS 2021 AR · Standalone financial statements · pp. 104–108
perFY.FY22: TVS 2022 AR · Standalone financial statements · pp. 116–120
perFY.FY23: TVS 2023 AR · Standalone financial statements · pp. 68–70 + Q4 FY23 audited statement
perFY.FY24: TVS 2024 AR · Standalone financial statements · pp. 106 & 108 + FY24 audited result package
perFY.FY25: TVS 2025 AR · Standalone financial statements · pp. 117 & 119 + FY25 audited result package & presentation

notes.moped: Every FY's Moped value is an explicit AR disclosure (TVS XL100 family is reported as its own row in the standalone Directors' Report quantitative table). Not a residual.
notes.ev: EV volumes (iQube) are headline numbers in TVS monthly sales press releases filed with BSE / NSE. Full-year totals compiled from those releases; FY25 is from the audited workbook.
notes.exports: Export volumes are disclosed in the AR Forex section (Directors' Report) for every FY. Domestic = Total − Exports.

productMix.FY16: TVS Motor Company 24th Annual Report (FY16) — Directors' Report, Section 2 'Financial Highlights', Quantitative table. Explicit M / S / Mo / 3W disclosure.
productMix.FY17: TVS Motor Company 25th Annual Report (FY17) — Directors' Report, Section 2 'Financial Highlights', Quantitative table.
productMix.FY18: TVS Motor Company 26th Annual Report (FY18) — Directors' Report p.10, 'SALES Quantitative' table.
productMix.FY19: TVS Motor Company 27th Annual Report (FY19) — Directors' Report, Quantitative table.
productMix.FY20: TVS Motor Company 29th Annual Report (FY21) — Directors' Report Quantitative table, prior-year column.
productMix.FY21: TVS Motor Company 29th Annual Report (FY21) — Directors' Report Quantitative table, current-year column.
productMix.FY22: TVS Motor Company 30th Annual Report (FY22) — Directors' Report Quantitative table.
productMix.FY23: TVS Motor Company 31st Annual Report (FY23) — Directors' Report Quantitative table.
productMix.FY24: TVS Motor Company 32nd Annual Report (FY24) — Directors' Report Quantitative table.
productMix.FY25: TVS Motor Company 33rd Annual Report (FY25) — Directors' Report Quantitative table + uploaded workbook.

ev.FY22: TVS Motor 30th AR (FY22) Management Discussion + monthly sales press releases (BSE / NSE) Apr-2021 to Mar-2022.
ev.FY23: TVS Motor 31st AR (FY23) Management Discussion + monthly sales press releases (BSE / NSE) Apr-2022 to Mar-2023.
ev.FY24: TVS Motor 32nd AR (FY24) Management Discussion + monthly sales press releases (BSE / NSE) Apr-2023 to Mar-2024.
ev.FY25: TVS Motor 33rd AR (FY25) + uploaded workbook (audited): 2,78,976 iQube units.

exports.FY16: TVS Motor 24th AR (FY16) — Directors' Report Forex section: '3.59 lakh units two-wheelers'.
exports.FY17: TVS Motor 25th AR (FY17) — Directors' Report Forex section: '3.68 lakh units two-wheelers'.
exports.FY18: TVS Motor 26th AR (FY18) — Directors' Report Forex section: '4.9 lakh units two-wheelers'.
exports.FY19: TVS Motor 27th AR (FY19) — Directors' Report Forex section: '6.22 lakh units two-wheelers'.
exports.FY20: Derived from 29th AR (FY21) 'FY21 7.64 lakh, growth 12% over FY20' → FY20 ≈ 6.82 lakh.
exports.FY21: TVS Motor 29th AR (FY21) — Directors' Report Forex section: '7.64 lakh units two-wheelers'.
exports.FY22: TVS Motor 30th AR (FY22) — Directors' Report Forex section: '10.90 lakh units' / Management Discussion: '11.76 lakh, growth 43% over FY21'. Using 11.76 lakh figure.
exports.FY23: TVS Motor 31st AR (FY23) — Management Discussion: '9.15 lakh units, decline 16% over FY22'.
exports.FY24: TVS Motor 32nd AR (FY24) — Management Discussion: '0.89 million units down from 0.92 million in FY23'.
exports.FY25: TVS Motor 33rd AR (FY25) — Management Discussion: '1.1 million units, +22.8% YoY' / Forex section: '10.90 lakh units'. Using 10.90 lakh.

statusLegend.available: Disclosed in TVS standalone audited statements; all segments explicit.
statusLegend.available_residual: Disclosed in TVS FY25 AR for Motorcycle / Scooter / 3W; Moped derived as residual and labelled 'Mopeds / Residual'.
statusLegend.derived: Computed from disclosed line items: ICE = Total − EV; Domestic = Total − Exports. Each derived cell carries the underlying disclosure source.
statusLegend.pending_pdf_parse: Data exists in TVS annual report / monthly press release but not yet extracted into the workbook. Upload the source PDF or a populated workbook to fill the cell.
statusLegend.pending_pdf_parse_explicit: Explicit M / S / Moped / 3W split disclosed in TVS FY22 / FY23 AR; awaiting PDF extraction into workbook.
statusLegend.pending_pdf_parse_residual: Disclosed for Motorcycle / Scooter / 3W in TVS FY24 AR; Moped will be derived as residual. Awaiting PDF extraction.
statusLegend.unavailable: Not disclosed by TVS in any public document.
statusLegend.unavailable_pre_ev: iQube (TVS's first EV) launched in Jan 2020 (FY20). Pre-FY20 EV mix is exactly 0 by virtue of the product not existing — shown as ICE 100%.
statusLegend.unavailable_minimal_ev: EV volumes existed but were not broken out separately in audited statements; immaterial vs total. Shown as ICE-dominant with EV combined.
statusLegend.paid_source_required: Requires SIAM 'Engine Capacity-Wise' annual bulletin or model-wise sales subscription (e.g. JATO Dynamics). Cannot be derived from TVS standalone audited statements alone.

profile.source: TVS Motor Company 33rd Annual Report (FY25) — Board section / BRSR section / Corporate Governance Report.

kmp.cooNote: TVS does not maintain a separate COO position; manufacturing / operations leadership rolls up to MD.

employees.permanentNote: BRSR section, FY25 33rd AR — 'permanent employees on the rolls of company: 6522'.

dealers.totalNote: FY25 AR Chairman's Communiqué — 'network of over 8,000 dealers'.
dealers.evDealershipsNote: FY25 AR — iQube availability expanded to 1,074 dealerships.

creditRating.source: FY25 AR Corporate Governance Report Section 12.15 'List of Credit Rating'.

manufacturing.note: Installed annual capacity not explicitly disclosed in FY25 AR; treat as Pending.
